=== Azure VM Pricing Estimate ===
VM:       Standard_D4s_v5
OS:       Windows
Region:   Australia East

--- PAYG (Pay-as-you-go) ---
Per VM:  USD 0.4240/hr  |  USD 309.52/month
AHB PAYG: USD 175.20/month  (save 43% vs Windows PAYG RRP)

--- Savings Plan (flexible, compute discount only) ---
License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP, no discount)

1-Year Savings Plan  (~26% compute discount):
  Compute: USD 130.31/month  (discounted)
  License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP)
  Total:   USD 264.63/month

3-Year Savings Plan  (~48% compute discount):
  Compute: USD 90.30/month  (discounted)
  License: USD 134.32/month  (at RRP)
  Total:   USD 224.62/month

--- Reserved Instances (vs PAYG) ---
1-Year RI  (save 22%):
  Per VM:  USD 242.40/month  (USD 108.08 compute + USD 134.32 Win license)
3-Year RI  (save 34%):
  Per VM:  USD 203.51/month  (USD 69.19 compute + USD 134.32 Win license)

--- Azure Hybrid Benefit (compute rate only, no Windows license) ---
(Requires existing Windows Server licenses with Software Assurance)
PAYG + HB:      USD 175.20/month  (save 43% vs Windows PAYG RRP)
1-Year RI + HB: USD 108.08/month  (save 65% vs Windows PAYG RRP)
3-Year RI + HB: USD 69.19/month  (save 78% vs Windows PAYG RRP)

=== Storage ===
OS disk  : Premium SSD P10 (128 GiB) — USD 19.71/month
Storage subtotal: USD 19.71/month
